title: Realistic Traffic Control
description: A Revamped Version Of Traffic Control That makes it a bit more Realistic
body:
Realistic Traffic Control is a complete reimagining of the original Traffic Control mod by CSX8600, developed and maintained by Gamearoo’s Development. Built for Minecraft 1.12.2, this mod introduces a more immersive and realistic system of traffic lights, sensors, pedestrian signals, signs, and controllers—perfect for cities, roleplay, and transportation infrastructure.

This is not just an update—it’s a total overhaul.

✅ Redesigned from the ground up with new models and mechanics

✅ Manual & automatic traffic light control systems

✅ Functional sensors, timers, and pedestrian crossing logic

✅ Fully customizable via in-game GUIs or scripting (e.g., ComputerCraft support)

✅ Supports realistic behaviors like red flash on power loss and directional timers

🚧 More features and improvements are continuously in development

Based on the original concept by CSX8600. Full credit for the original mod goes to them.

🔗 Wiki & Setup Guides:
https://github.com/Gamearoo-s-Development/Realistic-Traffic-Control/wiki

💬 Join the Community:
https://discord.gg/q3ycRjBG9q

🛠️ Note: There are no plans to port to newer Minecraft versions at this time.
